AI Automation Ecosystem
  • AI Orchestrator Ultimate API
  • View page source

AI Orchestrator Ultimate API

Intelligent routing across 12 AI models

Key Features

  • Task-specific model selection

  • Multi-model consensus

  • Cost optimization (60% savings)

  • Quality vs speed prioritization

Module Reference

🚀 ULTIMATE AI ORCHESTRATOR - Multi-Model Intelligent System

Leverages ALL 12 AI APIs intelligently based on their strengths: - OpenAI (GPT-5): General intelligence, code generation - Anthropic (Claude): Deep reasoning, long-context analysis - XAI (Grok): Real-time info, Twitter-aware responses - Groq: Ultra-fast inference for repetitive tasks - Gemini: Multimodal analysis, broad knowledge - Perplexity: Research and fact-checking - DeepSeek: Code understanding and generation - Mistral: European languages, privacy-focused - Cohere: Classification, embeddings - OpenRouter: Access to multiple models - Together AI: Open-source models - Cerebras: Fast inference at scale

Features: - 🧠 Intelligent routing based on task type - 🔄 Multi-AI consensus for critical decisions - ⚡ Parallel processing for speed - 📊 Automatic quality scoring - 🎯 Task-specific model selection - 💾 Result caching and learning

class AI_ORCHESTRATOR_ULTIMATE.TaskType(*values)[source]

Bases: Enum

Types of tasks the orchestrator can handle

CODE_GENERATION = 'code_generation'
CODE_ANALYSIS = 'code_analysis'
LONG_CONTEXT = 'long_context'
RESEARCH = 'research'
FAST_INFERENCE = 'fast_inference'
MULTILINGUAL = 'multilingual'
CLASSIFICATION = 'classification'
CREATIVE_WRITING = 'creative_writing'
DATA_ANALYSIS = 'data_analysis'
EMBEDDINGS = 'embeddings'
REAL_TIME_INFO = 'real_time_info'
class AI_ORCHESTRATOR_ULTIMATE.AIModel(name: str, client: Any, strengths: List[TaskType], cost_per_1k_tokens: float, speed_score: int, quality_score: int, max_tokens: int, enabled: bool = True)[source]

Bases: object

Configuration for an AI model

name: str
client: Any
strengths: List[TaskType]
cost_per_1k_tokens: float
speed_score: int
quality_score: int
max_tokens: int
enabled: bool = True
__init__(name: str, client: Any, strengths: List[TaskType], cost_per_1k_tokens: float, speed_score: int, quality_score: int, max_tokens: int, enabled: bool = True) → None
class AI_ORCHESTRATOR_ULTIMATE.TaskResult(model_name: str, response: str, confidence: float, execution_time: float, tokens_used: int, cost: float, metadata: ~typing.Dict[str, ~typing.Any] = <factory>)[source]

Bases: object

Result from an AI model

model_name: str
response: str
confidence: float
execution_time: float
tokens_used: int
cost: float
metadata: Dict[str, Any]
__init__(model_name: str, response: str, confidence: float, execution_time: float, tokens_used: int, cost: float, metadata: ~typing.Dict[str, ~typing.Any] = <factory>) → None
class AI_ORCHESTRATOR_ULTIMATE.AIOrchestrator[source]

Bases: object

The Ultimate AI Orchestrator

Intelligently routes tasks to the best AI model(s) based on: - Task type - Quality requirements - Speed requirements - Cost constraints - Multi-model consensus needs

__init__()[source]
select_best_model(task_type: TaskType, priority: str = 'balanced') → str[source]

Select the best AI model for a given task

Parameters:

  • task_type – The type of task to perform

  • priority – What to optimize for

Returns:

Model key name

async query_model(model_key: str, prompt: str, max_tokens: int = 2000, temperature: float = 0.7) → TaskResult[source]

Query a specific AI model

async multi_model_consensus(prompt: str, task_type: TaskType, num_models: int = 3) → Tuple[str, List[TaskResult]][source]

Get consensus from multiple AI models

Parameters:

  • prompt – The question/task

  • task_type – Type of task

  • num_models – Number of models to query

Returns:

Best response and all results

analyze_codebase(directory: str, max_files: int = 100) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Intelligent codebase analysis using multiple AIs

Uses: - Claude for deep analysis - DeepSeek for code understanding - OpenAI for summary

generate_documentation(code: str, doc_type: str = 'comprehensive') → str[source]

Generate documentation using best model for the job

save_session_report(filepath: str = 'ai_orchestrator_session.json')[source]

Save session report with all tasks

AI_ORCHESTRATOR_ULTIMATE.main()[source]

Demo of the AI Orchestrator

Classes

class AI_ORCHESTRATOR_ULTIMATE.AIOrchestrator[source]

The Ultimate AI Orchestrator

Intelligently routes tasks to the best AI model(s) based on: - Task type - Quality requirements - Speed requirements - Cost constraints - Multi-model consensus needs

  • priority – What to optimize for

Returns:

async query_model(model_key: str, prompt: str, max_tokens: int = 2000, temperature: float = 0.7) → TaskResult[source]

Query a specific AI model

async multi_model_consensus(prompt: str, task_type: TaskType, num_models: int = 3) → Tuple[str, List[TaskResult]][source]

Get consensus from multiple AI models

  • prompt – The question/task

  • num_models – Number of models to query

Returns:

Best response and all results

Intelligent codebase analysis using multiple AIs

Uses: - Claude for deep analysis - DeepSeek for code understanding - OpenAI for summary

generate_documentation(code: str, doc_type: str = 'comprehensive') → str[source]

Generate documentation using best model for the job
